title: Refactor podman-py project structure
body:
This Issue was originally a PR, since the changes are too many to do all at once, I am closing it in favor of splitting it in multiple steps. [This is the original PR](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/422)

---

- [x] Update python version's support https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/469
  - [x] Remove EOL Python Versions
  - [x] Add latest Python Versions
- [x] Add pre-commit https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/473
  - [x] Add configurations and checks
  - [x] Add pre-commit workflow
- [x] Update linting to modern and more safe standards https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/473
  - [x] Move linting and formatting workflows out of the cirrus automation
  - [x] Remove pylint and black custom code and use a unified tool to lint and format in a single environment
  - [x] At this stage, Cirrus is still the automation used for testing. https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/473#issuecomment-2520130014
  - [x] Keep the support with Makefile for linting locally
- [x] Enable security and code sanity checks https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/476

- [x] Delegate the project to pyproject.toml https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/480
  - [x] remove unused files `setup.py`, `setup.cfg`, `*requirements.txt`
  - [x] split the package dependencies and package testing in a separate package
  - [x] split the package dependencies and package docs in a separate package

- [x] Automate the release process on PyPI https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/480
- [x] Remove the dependency from Cirrus and rely on TMT for testing https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/548#event-17535286384
  - [x] Run linting on TMT for Fedora Stable only https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/503
  - [x] Run coverage checks on TMT for Fedora Stable only https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/531
  - [x] Run upstream integration tests on TMT for Fedora, Centos and EPEL https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/509
  - [x] Run downstream tests on TMT https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/522
